name: Executive Inbox — Workato Native Blueprint
summary: Automates executive email triage by reading unread email messages, identifying those from customers or prospects, enriching them with CRM context from Backstory, and using AI to classify and route each message. Native-first Workato blueprint that favors recipe functions, custom connectors, and native delivery/connectivity surfaces over raw HTTP steps.

native_connectors_required: Backstory custom connector built with the Connector SDK
Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or approved email connector for message delivery
Lookup tables, data tables, or project properties for routing and canonical maps
Webhook connector, database connector, queue adapter, or downstream orchestrator action
prohibited_patterns: No repeated Universal HTTP or ad hoc API request actions for Slack, CRM, calendar, or email delivery
No credentials stored in formula literals, project properties comments, or recipe notes
No agent output sent straight to transport or records without JSON schema validation
No routing, dedupe, or retry logic hidden inside opaque code snippets when Recipe Functions or data tables can own it

targets: Webhook, queue, database, or downstream workflow sink
connectors: Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or approved email connector for message delivery
Webhook connector, database connector, queue adapter, or downstream orchestrator action

recipe_functions.purpose: Normalize the Executive Inbox trigger into the shared run_context contract.
Load and normalize the primary Executive Inbox business inputs into source_record objects.
Join the intermediate context needed for Executive Inbox, especially Identify Customer Emails, Enrich with Account Context, Await & Follow Up.
Render normalized delivery_payload objects for Executive Inbox.
Capture deterministic summary, dedupe, and retry state for Executive Inbox.

steps: Use email connector action for Identify Customer Emails
Use Backstory custom connector action for Enrich with Account Context
Use an LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for AI Triage & Classification
Use database, queue, webhook, or downstream app connector for Route to Channels
Use Backstory custom connector action for Await & Follow Up
Record deterministic run summary and retry state

ai_triage_classification.intent: AI Agent (via agent, structured output parser, and chain) analyzes email content plus account context to assign urgency, category, and routing recommendation.

deployment_notes: Store connector configuration, defaults, and destination IDs in connection objects or project properties.
Expose Backstory through a reusable custom connector instead of repeated HTTP actions.
Use lookup tables or data tables for routing maps, dedupe keys, and canonical mappings.
Split fan-out delivery into deterministic recipe-function stages so Slack, Teams, and email stay independently testable.
Keep synthesis agentic, but keep delivery and persistence deterministic.
